name: screenlink
description: Virtual Extended Monitor - Seamless Screen Sharing

scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.dev:frontend: workspaces -a exec npm run tauri dev --if-present -- --filter=frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm run tauri build
scripts.app: cd frontend && npm run tauri dev

author: ScreenLink Contributors
